description: Professional wine recommendation and substitution matrix for sommelier/content operations.
professional_principles: Substitution preserves the customer's expected role: color/category, structure, price band, and style family matter before brand.
Similarity is driven by drinking experience: body, acidity, tannin, sweetness, flavor family, and grape/style family.
Origin is hierarchical: same subregion is strongest, then region, country, then classic cross-region style affinity.
Trade-up keeps the style promise while improving perceived quality, region prestige, brand strength, or presentation.
Value alternative lowers price while keeping enough structure and style continuity to avoid customer disappointment.
Gift and promotion recommendations prioritize presentation, recognized region/brand, validated content, and availability.

dimension_definitions.category: Wine color/type or category fit such as Red Wine, White Wine, Champagne, Sparkling Wine, Rose Wine.
dimension_definitions.grape_family: Professional style family inferred from grape, cuvee name, classification, and known regional style aliases.
dimension_definitions.origin: Country, region, and subregion relationship using hierarchical proximity.
dimension_definitions.structure: Drinking shape across body, acidity, tannin, and sweetness.
dimension_definitions.flavor: Overlap or family resemblance in flavor tags.
dimension_definitions.price: Fit to the relationship intent: close replacement, lower value option, or premium trade-up.
dimension_definitions.quality: Operational trust signals: validation status, confidence, image, and short copy.
dimension_definitions.presentation: Gift/promotion suitability: image, brand, region, validation, and premium price signal.

direct_substitute.label: Direct Substitute
direct_substitute.intent: Replace an item while preserving customer expectation.

similar_style.label: Similar Style
similar_style.intent: Suggest products with a comparable drinking profile.

trade_up.label: Trade Up
trade_up.intent: Recommend a more premium expression without changing the style too much.

value_alternative.label: Value Alternative
value_alternative.intent: Recommend a lower-priced option that preserves the main style cues.

premium_gift.label: Premium Gift
premium_gift.intent: Surface products suitable for gifting and promotion.

classic_cross_region_affinities.rationale: Cabernet-led structured reds can substitute across classic regions when structure and price align.
Cool-climate Pinot Noir regions share aromatic red-fruit, acidity, and lighter tannin expectations.
Syrah/Shiraz regions can cross-substitute when full body, dark fruit, pepper, and tannin profile align.
Chardonnay can substitute across classic regions when acidity, body, and oak profile align.
Sauvignon Blanc styles can cross-substitute when aromatic intensity and acidity align.

risk_flags.out_of_stock: Candidate has no current stock or active availability signal.
risk_flags.low_confidence: Candidate has low enrichment confidence; review before using in customer-facing material.
risk_flags.missing_image: Candidate lacks product image, weakening gift/promotion suitability.
risk_flags.missing_copy: Candidate lacks short copy, weakening staff/customer explanation.
risk_flags.wide_structure_gap: Candidate differs materially in body, acidity, tannin, or sweetness.
risk_flags.different_origin: Candidate is from a different origin; acceptable for style discovery but risky for direct replacement.
